turns.text: Hi, this is GreenLeaf Solar following up on your quote request.
Yeah, is it actually worth it?
Absolutely — I guarantee you'll save at least 50% on your electric bill, no risk.
What's your average monthly bill, and when would be a good time for a consultation?
Great, I'll schedule that for you.

findings.label: Opens with a branded greeting
findings.evidence: Hi, this is GreenLeaf Solar following up on your quote request.

findings.label: Avoids compliance-risky guarantees
findings.evidence: Absolutely — I guarantee you'll save at least 50% on your electric bill, no risk.

findings.label: Offers to book an appointment
findings.evidence: Great, I'll schedule that for you.

findings.label: Asks a qualifying question
findings.evidence: What's your average monthly bill, and when would be a good time for a consultation?
